chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-6045 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.26807/2024. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 18.12.2024 Mr. Irfan Ahmed Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for the respondent along with Niaz Ahmed, A.C. I.R. CTO Zone-II, Karachi. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Yesterday, the following order was passed: “Today, Mr. Niaz Ahmed, Assistant Commissioner, Inland Revenue, CTO Zone-II, Karachi is present and states that IRIS of the petitioner has not been blocked. Learned counsel for the petitioner to ascertain. To come up tomorrow i.e. 18.12.2024, when, the officer will be present. Adjourned.” Today, it has been confirmed that the petitioner has access to the IRIS. In view hereof, petition is stated to be served its purpose, hence, is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
